scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace-ask-user build && vite
scripts.dev:local: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace-ask-user build && BORING_USE_LOCAL_PACKAGES=1 vite
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace-ask-user build && vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-agent build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace build && pnpm --filter @hachej/boring-workspace-ask-user build && tsc --noEmit
